title: ClansFix
description: ClansFix — a powerful clan plugin for Minecraft servers that adds deep clan systems with progression, quests, ranks, and customization . It turns group gameplay into an engaging experience with leveling, treasury, houses, and competitive rankings .
body:
# ClansFix

> Advanced clan management plugin for Paper 1.21.7

ClansFix is a full-featured clan system for Minecraft servers, designed for Paper 1.21.7 with a modern GUI-driven interface, multi-language support, and deep customization.

---

## Features

### ⚔️ Clan Management
- Create / delete clans with configurable naming rules and economy costs
- Invite players, accept join requests, or open clans for anyone to join
- Kick members, promote/demote ranks, transfer ownership
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60d979ca0c84848003ff50268cc412b6cae8c569.png)
### 📈 Level & Upgrade System
- 5 clan levels with quest-based progression
- 18 quest types: kill mobs, mine blocks, collect items, catch fish, enchant, brew, trade, and more
- Upgrade cost from clan treasury, per-level requirements

### 🏦 Treasury
- Deposit / withdraw money via Vault economy
- Role-based permission: who can withdraw and who can deposit
- Balance displayed in clan info and GUI

### 📦 Clan Storage
- Shared item vault accessible by trusted members
- GUI-powered storage with permission gates

### 🏠 Clan House
- Set, teleport to, and delete your clan's home
- Toggle via permissions

### 👥 Member Permissions
- 20 granular permissions assignable per member via GUI
- Cover treasury, house, storage, raids, invites, armor, PvP, holograms, and more
- Priority system prevents lower-rank members from overriding higher-rank permissions

### 🏆 Rankings
- Global clan ranking with composite score (KDR, balance, members, level, raid points)
- Dedicated raid ranking leaderboard

### 💬 Clan Chat
- Private chat channel for clan members
- Toggle on/off with `/clan chat`

### 🛡️ Raid System
- Wave-based PvE raids (7 waves, boss on wave 7)
- Clan level and online member requirements
- Point system with configurable scoring
- Mob level scaling, particle effects, boss bars, custom AI
- Reward commands for top participants and clans
- Auto-generated raid zones with chunk loading protection
- Cooldown between raids, max concurrent raids

### 🎨 Clan Armor & Coat of Arms
- Equip clan-wide visual armor set
- Set a coat of arms (item icon) displayed above players

### 🔮 Holograms
- TextDisplay showing clan name above each member's head
- ItemDisplay showing coat of arms
- Fully configurable: offset, scale, billboard, background, opacity, rotation
![holo+armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3889ee45fb9e07628b297db994f09ec6c79bdf26.png)
### 🛠️ Admin Tools
- Clan list GUI — view and manage all clans
- Teleport all clan members to you
- Clear member inventories
- Reload plugin config & languages at runtime

### 🌐 Multi-Language
- English, Russian, German, French, Spanish, Polish
- Configurable via `config.yml`

---

## Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|---|---|
| `clansfix.*` | All permissions |
| `clansfix.admin` | Admin access |
| `clansfix.create` | Create a clan |
| `clansfix.join` | Join a clan |
| `clansfix.leave` | Leave a clan |
| `clansfix.invite` | Invite players |
| `clansfix.kick` | Kick members |
| `clansfix.house` | Manage clan house |
| `clansfix.treasury` | Access treasury |
| `clansfix.upgrade` | Upgrade clan |
| `clansfix.rank` | Manage ranks |
| `clansfix.reload` | Reload plugin |

---

## Dependencies

- **Paper** 1.21.7 (API)
- **Vault** — economy integration
- **PlaceholderAPI** — placeholders (`%clan_name%`, `%clan_rank%`, etc.)
- **ProtocolLib** — packet utilities

---

## Commands

Basic commands:

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/clan create <name>` | Create a clan |
| `/clan join <clan>` | Join an open clan |
| `/clan leave` | Leave your clan |
| `/clan invite <player>` | Invite a player |
| `/clan accept <clan>` | Accept invitation |
| `/clan decline <clan>` | Decline invitation |
| `/clan kick <player>` | Kick a member |
| `/clan deposit <amount>` | Deposit to treasury |
| `/clan house set/tp` | Manage clan home |
| `/clan top` | View rankings |
| `/clan info` | Clan info |
| `/clan admin` | Admin panel |
| `/clan reload` | Reload plugin |

Type `/clan help` in-game for the full list.

---
